bacterial_leaf_blight.symptoms: Water-soaked stripes on leaf blades that turn yellow and then grayish-white.
bacterial_leaf_blight.cause: Bacterial infection entering through wounds or natural openings in the plant.
bacterial_leaf_blight.favorable_conditions: High humidity, heavy rain, and warm temperatures (25-34°C).
bacterial_leaf_blight.spread: Wind, rain splashes, and irrigation water.
bacterial_leaf_blight.treatment_en: 1. Drain the field to reduce humidity. 2. Apply copper-based bactericides. 3. Avoid excessive nitrogen fertilizer.
bacterial_leaf_blight.treatment_ur: 1۔ کھیت سے پانی نکال دیں۔ 2۔ کاپر پر مبنی جراثیک کش ادویات کا سپرے کریں۔ 3۔ نائٹروجن کھاد کا زیادہ استعمال نہ کریں۔
bacterial_leaf_blight.prevention: Use resistant varieties and ensure proper field drainage.

brown_spot.symptoms: Many small, circular to oval, dark brown spots on the leaves.
brown_spot.cause: Fungal infection, often indicating poor soil nutrition.
brown_spot.treatment_en: 1. Apply soil nutrients, especially Potassium. 2. Spray Mancozeb or Propiconazole. 3. Treat seeds before planting.
brown_spot.treatment_ur: 1۔ مٹی میں پوٹاشیم کی کمی پوری کریں۔ 2۔ مانکوزیب کا سپرے کریں۔ 3۔ بیج کو بونے سے پہلے دوائی لگائیں۔

healthy.symptoms: Leaves are uniformly green with no spots, lesions, or yellowing.
healthy.cause: Optimal growing conditions and absence of pathogens.
healthy.favorable_conditions: Balanced nutrients, proper water management, and good sunlight.
healthy.treatment_en: No treatment required. Continue standard agricultural practices.
healthy.treatment_ur: کسی علاج کی ضرورت نہیں۔ معمول کے مطابق دیکھ بھال جاری رکھیں۔
healthy.prevention: Maintain current fertilizer and irrigation schedules.

leaf_blast.symptoms: Diamond-shaped or eye-shaped lesions with gray centers and dark brown borders.
leaf_blast.cause: Aggressive fungal pathogen that attacks leaves, collars, and panicles.
leaf_blast.favorable_conditions: Cool nights, warm days, and extended periods of dew.
leaf_blast.treatment_en: 1. Apply Tricyclazole or Isoprothiolane immediately. 2. Do not let the field dry out. 3. Split nitrogen applications.
leaf_blast.treatment_ur: 1۔ ٹرائی سائیکلازول کا فوری سپرے کریں۔ 2۔ کھیت کو خشک نہ ہونے دیں۔ 3۔ نائٹروجن کھاد کو قسطوں میں ڈالیں۔
leaf_blast.prevention: Plant resistant varieties and manage water levels carefully.

leaf_scald.symptoms: Irregular lesions with light centers and dark brown margins, giving a scalded appearance.
leaf_scald.cause: Fungal disease transmitted via infected seeds and plant debris.
leaf_scald.favorable_conditions: Warm, wet tropical climates and high nitrogen levels.
leaf_scald.spread: Infected seeds, water splashes, and field residues.
leaf_scald.treatment_en: 1. Apply Benomyl or Thiophanate-methyl. 2. Use clean seeds. 3. Practice crop rotation.
leaf_scald.treatment_ur: 1۔ بینومائل استعمال کریں۔ 2۔ صاف بیج استعمال کریں۔ 3۔ فصلوں کی تبدیلی کریں۔

narrow_brown_spot.symptoms: Short, linear, brown lesions parallel to the leaf veins.
narrow_brown_spot.cause: Fungal pathogen that thrives late in the growing season.
narrow_brown_spot.favorable_conditions: Low soil potassium and late planting.
narrow_brown_spot.spread: Wind-blown spores and infected plant residue.
narrow_brown_spot.treatment_en: 1. Apply Propiconazole if the infection is severe. 2. Ensure adequate Potassium in the soil.
narrow_brown_spot.treatment_ur: 1۔ بیماری شدید ہونے پر پروپیکونازول کا سپرے کریں۔ 2۔ مٹی میں پوٹاشیم کی مقدار مناسب رکھیں۔
narrow_brown_spot.prevention: Use early-maturing varieties and plow under crop residue.

not_rice.name_ur: یہ چاول کا پودا نہیں ہے
not_rice.symptoms: The uploaded image does not appear to contain a recognizable rice leaf.
not_rice.treatment_en: Please ensure you are taking a clear, focused picture of a rice leaf in good lighting.
not_rice.treatment_ur: براہ کرم یقینی بنائیں کہ آپ اچھی روشنی میں چاول کے پتے کی واضح تصویر لے رہے ہیں۔
not_rice.prevention: Ensure the subject is centered in the camera frame.
